home.headline: Discover your DAR
home.subhead: Enter your date of birth and receive a message about your nature, your power, and your path

dar.read_in_book: Read about your DAR in the Book of DARs
dar.read_in_book_sub: Full description, practices, meditations and safety techniques for every DAR
dar.share_card: Create a card for social media
dar.want_deeper: Want to go deeper? The Book of DARs has the full description of all 64 DARs

profile.title: Personal Cabinet

daily.research_sub: Help science: take a 28-statement survey (about 7 min) and become part of the first scientific study of DARs in Dubai
daily.intuition_sub: Guess the DAR and develop your inner sense
daily.feedback_sub_short: Found a bug? Have an idea? Write to us!

intuition.leaderboard_sub: Points for difficulty and streak; sandbox not counted

donate.title: Thank the author
donate.sub: If YupDar resonates with you, you can support the project with any amount. It helps the Universe of DARs grow.
donate.legal:
All prices are in Russian rubles. Subscriptions renew automatically. You can cancel at any time in your account.
Learn more in our Offer and Terms of Service.

avatar.too_large: Photo is too large. Maximum 5 MB.

referral.share_text: If your friend's DAR differs from yours, you'll unlock it in your Treasury and earn crystals
referral.send_link: Send a link to a friend
referral.share_message: Discover YupDar — a journey to your DAR. Find your DAR by birth date and start the path of Alchemy.
referral.welcome_unlocked:
Welcome to YupDar!

Your DAR is now unlocked in the Treasury of the person who invited you. It's a special connection that begins your shared journey.

+{crystals} wisdom crystals as a welcome.
referral.welcome_existing:
Welcome to YupDar!

The person who invited you already had your DAR in their Treasury. But you bring them wisdom crystals.

+{crystals} wisdom crystals as a welcome.

landing.subtitle: Universe of DARs
landing.hero_text: Discover your unique DAR by date of birth. Receive personal Oracle messages. Unlock your potential with an AI mentor. Understand your close ones.
landing.f1_text: Original system of self-discovery. Calculation by birth date, full description of essence, power and facets of each DAR.
landing.f2_text: AI-generated daily messages based on your DAR. Daily practice, energies, advice.
landing.f3_text: 94 chapters with full descriptions of all 64 DARs. Interactive reader with themes, bookmarks and search.
landing.f4_text: A dialogue coach that helps reveal facets of your DAR. Powered by DeepSeek AI, gently guiding awareness.
landing.f5_text: Calculate DARs of your loved ones, check compatibility, get a personal book for parents about their child.
landing.f6_text: Guess the DAR among cards. Battles with the AI dragon Yupik. Leaderboards and tournaments.
landing.wanderer_desc: Start your acquaintance with the world of DARs
landing.wanderer_f4: Preview of the Book of DARs (10 chapters)
landing.book_alt_pay:
one-time purchase, lifetime access
or 500 ⭐ Telegram Stars / 44M DarAI
landing.book_desc: Only the full Book of DARs: without the other features
landing.master_alt_pay:
monthly auto-renewing subscription. Cancel anytime.
or 750 ⭐ Telegram Stars / month / 66M DarAI per month
landing.master_desc: Extended access to all main features
landing.master_f1: Everything from the «Book of DARs» plan
landing.guardian_alt_pay:
monthly auto-renewing subscription
or 1,000 ⭐ Telegram Stars / month / 88M DarAI per month
landing.guardian_desc: Extended plan for practicing Masters and facilitators
landing.guardian_f4: Advanced materials — once the Library launches

dar2.unlocked_in_treasury: DAR {name} is unlocked in your Treasury! +10 crystals
dar2.confirm_change_date:
Change date of birth?

If you made a mistake, you can enter the correct date. Your unlocked DARs and crystals will be kept.

practices.title: Library of Practices
practices.coming_note: This section will appear in future updates. For now the «Guardian» plan unlocks the other advanced features.

tariffs_modal.master_desc: Extended access to all main features. Cancel at any time.
tariffs_modal.guardian_desc: Extended plan for practicing Masters and facilitators who guide others
tariffs_modal.master_soon: «Master» subscription is coming soon. Stay tuned!
tariffs_modal.guardian_soon: «Guardian» subscription is coming soon. Stay tuned!

games.hub_sub: Choose a game and develop your intuition
games.intuition_desc: Guess the DAR among cards. Classic, multi-search, solo or battle with the AI dragon Yupik
games.atlantis_desc: Card battle of Magic, Life, Power and Might. You against an AI opponent and the Higher Powers
games.battles_desc: Challenge a friend, battle in real time and reach the Hall of Fame

rel.title: ADD A CLOSE ONE
rel.warning: ⚠️ Note: once you save this person, you cannot edit or delete them. This protects against impersonation and abuse. Please check the data before saving.
rel.intro: Fill in the data of your close one to calculate their DAR.

psu.title: YOUR PATH BEGINS
psu.birthdate_hint: Same date you used when calculating your DAR. If wrong — fix it here.
psu.birthtime_hint: If you don't know the exact time, use 12:00
psu.accuracy_warning: ⚠️ For accurate and deep readings, all data must be real. Made-up name, time or place of birth will lead to messages that don't fit you.

tariffs.promo_first_month: 🎁 First month of any plan with −{percent}% off
tariffs.book_desc: Full Book of DARs with all 94 chapters + designer PDF. Forever, no subscription.
tariffs.book_note: Opens only the Book content. Does not affect plan or its limits.
tariffs.footnote: The subscription does not renew automatically. When the period ends, your access returns to «Wanderer», but all your data is kept.
tariffs.free_for_all: Available to everyone, no payment needed
tariffs.email_prompt: Enter your email for the YooKassa receipt:

limits.oracle_locked_msg: On the free plan you have 1 prediction per day. Get Guardian — 3 per day. Or Master — unlimited.
limits.compatibility_locked_msg: Your free check is already used. Guardian gives 5 per month, Master — unlimited.
limits.hero_journey_locked_title: The Hero's Path is still closed
limits.hero_journey_locked_msg: You can open this Path: invite a friend with this DAR (you'll get a preview for free), buy for 300 crystals / 50 Stars / $0.99, or get Master — they have all 64 DARs unlocked.
limits.footer_note: You can cancel the subscription at any moment
